prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第131名，近年排名在127–136之间波动，属于中下游211层次；声誉文件未收录新疆大学相关舆情，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第72，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量处于中低水平；未见投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科实力相对薄弱，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科专业社会热度平稳；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；新疆大学位于乌鲁木齐市，地处西北偏远地区，距山西省较远，对山西考生的跨省吸引力有限，报考热度受地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的新高考基数效应、2026年大幅扩招（+31.7%）带来的竞争加剧预期，以及物理类考生小幅减少（-3.4%）和地域偏远对报考热度的抑制作用，预测2026年最低位次约73505名，区间73005–74005名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 21915 → 33693 → 27417 → 32116 → 61926. In 2025, due to the first implementation of the new college entrance examination (physics category) in Shanxi Province, batch merging caused a significant backward shift in rankings to about 61926. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 61926. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shanxi Province was 28 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 30 in 2024, 41 in 2025, and planned 54 in 2026, an increase of 13 students (+31.7%) compared to 2025. The expansion is relatively large, theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities. The reputation file does not include any related public opinion about Xinjiang University, and overall reputation is stable. Douyin popularity ranks 72nd, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level. No records of admission interruptions or anomalies have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University has no disciplines rated A- or above, and its advantageous disciplines are relatively weak, limiting its appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of related engineering majors is stable. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, a remote northwestern region far from Shanxi Province, limiting its cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi examinees. Enrollment popularity is affected by geographical preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings due to the new college entrance examination base effect in 2025, the intensified competition from the substantial enrollment expansion (+31.7%) in 2026, the slight decrease in physics category examinees (-3.4%), and the dampening effect of remote geography on enrollment popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 73,505, with a range of 73,005 to 74,005.
